Environmental Protection.summary: Schumer has consistently supported climate action legislation and clean energy investments throughout his Senate tenure.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act with $369 billion for climate programs (Congress.gov, August 2022)
Bipartisan Infrastructure Law with climate resilience funding (Congress.gov, November 2021)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Schumer has supported federal criminal justice reform measures including sentencing reform.
voted_for: First Step Act for federal prison and sentencing reform (Congress.gov, December 2018)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Schumer has advocated for higher taxes on corporations and wealthy individuals.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act with 15% corporate minimum tax (Congress.gov, August 2022)
voted_against: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (Congress.gov, December 2017)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Schumer has been a vocal supporter of abortion rights and reproductive healthcare access.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act to codify Roe v. Wade (Congress.gov, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Schumer has consistently supported LGBTQ+ civil rights protections.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Congress.gov, November 2022)

Fresh Food Access.summary: Gillibrand has advocated for food security programs and agricultural support.

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Gillibrand has been a strong advocate for abortion rights and reproductive healthcare.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (Congress.gov, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Gillibrand has consistently supported LGBTQ+ equality legislation.

Don't Ask Don't Tell Repeal Act (Congress.gov, December 2010)
